contentBlocks.original:
विदिताखिलशास्त्रसुधाजलधे
महितोपनिषत् कथितार्थनिधे ।
हृदये कलये विमलं चरणं
भव शंकर देशिक मे शरणम् ॥ १॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
viditākhilaśāstrasudhājaladhe
mahitopaniṣat kathitārthanidhe .
hṛdaye kalaye vimalaṃ caraṇaṃ
bhava śaṃkara deśika me śaraṇam .. 1..
contentBlocks.translation: O thou, the knower of all the milk-Ocean of scriptures! The expounder of the topics of the great Upanisadic treasure-trove! On thy faultless feet I meditate in my heart. Be thou my refuge O master, Sankara.
contentBlocks.meanings: विदित (vidita) – known; अखिल (akhila) – all; शास्त्र (śāstra) – scriptures; सुधा (sudhā) – nectar; जलधे (jaladhe) – ocean; महित (mahita) – great; उपनिषत् (upaniṣat) – Upanishad; कथित (kathita) – expounded; अर्थ (artha) – meaning; निधे (nidhe) – treasure; हृदये (hṛdaye) – in the heart; कलये (kalaye) – I meditate; विमलम् (vimalam) – pure; चरणम् (caraṇam) – feet; भव (bhava) – become; शंकर (śaṃkara) – Shankara; देशिक (deśika) – teacher; मे (me) – my; शरणम् (śaraṇam) – refuge;

contentBlocks.original:
करुणावरुणालय पालय मां
भवसागरदुःखविदूनहृदम् ।
रचयाखिलदर्शनतत्त्वविदं
भव शंकर देशिक मे शरणम् ॥ २॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
karuṇāvaruṇālaya pālaya māṃ
bhavasāgaraduḥkhavidūnahṛdam .
racayākhiladarśanatattvavidaṃ
bhava śaṃkara deśika me śaraṇam .. 2..
contentBlocks.translation: O the Ocean of compassion! Save me whose heart is tormented by the misery of the sea of birth! Make me understand the truths of all the schools of philosophy! Be thou my refuge, O master, Sañkara.
contentBlocks.meanings: करुणावरुणालय (karuṇāvaruṇālaya) – O ocean of compassion (karuṇā:compassion | varuṇa:ocean | ālaya:abode); पालय (pālaya) – protect; माम् (mām) – me; भवसागरदुःखविदूनहृदम् (bhavasāgaraduḥkhavidūnahṛdam) – heart tormented by life's sea (bhava:life | sāgara:sea | duḥkha:sorrow | vidūna:tormented | hṛdam:heart); रचय (racaya) – make; अखिलदर्शनतत्त्वविदम् (akhiladarśanatattvavidam) – knower of all philosophies (akhila:all | darśana:philosophies | tattva:truths | vidam:knower); भव (bhava) – become; शंकर (śaṃkara) – Shankara; देशिक (deśika) – teacher; मे (me) – my; शरणम् (śaraṇam) – refuge;

contentBlocks.original:
भवता जनता सुहिता भविता
निजबोधविचारण चारुमते ।
कलयेश्वरजीवविवेकविदं
भव शंकर देशिक मे शरणम् ॥ ३॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bhavatā janatā suhitā bhavitā
nijabodhavicāraṇa cārumate .
kalayeśvarajīvavivekavidaṃ
bhava śaṃkara deśika me śaraṇam .. 3..
contentBlocks.translation: By thee the masses have been made happy, O thou who hast a noble intellect, skilled in the inquiry into self-knowledge! Enable me to understand the wisdom relating to god and the soul. Be thou my refuge, O master, Sañkara.
contentBlocks.meanings: भवता (bhavatā) – by thee; जनता (janatā) – the masses; सुहिता (suhitā) – made happy; भविता (bhavitā) – will be; निजबोधविचारण (nijabodhavicāraṇa) – inquiry into self-knowledge (nija:self | bodha:knowledge | vicāraṇa:inquiry); चारुमते (cārumate) – noble intellect; कलय (kalaya) – enable me to understand; ईश्वरजीवविवेकविदं (īśvarajīvavivekavidaṃ) – wisdom relating to god and soul (īśvara:god | jīva:soul | viveka:discrimination | vidam:knowing); भव (bhava) – be; शंकर (śaṃkara) – Sañkara; देशिक (deśika) – master; मे (me) – my; शरणम् (śaraṇam) – refuge;

contentBlocks.original:
भव एव भवानिति मे नितरां
समजायत चेतसि कौतुकिता ।
मम वारय मोहमहाजलधिं
भव शंकर देशिक मे शरणम् ॥ ४॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bhava eva bhavāniti me nitarāṃ
samajāyata cetasi kautukitā .
mama vāraya mohamahājaladhiṃ
bhava śaṃkara deśika me śaraṇam .. 4..
contentBlocks.translation: Knowing that thou art verily the supreme lord, there arises overwhelming bliss in my heart. Protect me from the vast ocean of delusion. Be thou my refuge, O master, Sankara.
contentBlocks.meanings: भव (bhava) – become; एव (eva) – indeed; भवान् (bhavān) – you; इति (iti) – thus; मे (me) – my; नितरां (nitarāṃ) – exceedingly; समजायत (samajāyata) – arose; चेतसि (cetasi) – in the mind; कौतुकिता (kautukitā) – curiosity; मम (mama) – my; वारय (vāraya) – ward off; मोहमहाजलधिं (mohamahājaladhiṃ) – delusion's great ocean (moha:delusion | mahā:great | jaladhiṃ:ocean); भव (bhava) – become; शंकर (śaṃkara) – Shankara; देशिक (deśika) – teacher; मे (me) – my; शरणम् (śaraṇam) – refuge;

contentBlocks.original:
सुकृतेऽधिकृते बहुधा भवतो
भविता समदर्शनलालसता ।
अतिदीनमिमं परिपालय मा
ंभव शंकर देशिक मे शरणम् ॥ ५॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
sukṛte'dhikṛte bahudhā bhavato
bhavitā samadarśanalālasatā .
atidīnamimaṃ paripālaya mā
ṃbhava śaṃkara deśika me śaraṇam .. 5..
contentBlocks.translation: Desire for the insight into unity through thee will spring only when virtuous deeds are performed in abundance and in various directions. Protect this extremely helpless person. Be thou my refuge, O master, Sañkara.
contentBlocks.meanings: सुकृते (sukṛte) – virtuous deeds; अधिकृते (adhikṛte) – performed in abundance; बहुधा (bahudhā) – in various directions; भवतो (bhavato) – through thee; भविता (bhavitā) – will spring; समदर्शनलालसता (samadarśanalālasatā) – desire for insight into unity (sama:unity | darśana:insight | lālasatā:desire); अतिदीनम् (atidīnam) – extremely helpless; इमं (imam) – this; परिपालय (paripālaya) – protect; माम् (mām) – me; भव (bhava) – O master; शंकर (śaṃkara) – Sañkara; देशिक (deśika) – teacher; मे (me) – my; शरणम् (śaraṇam) – refuge;

contentBlocks.original:
जगतीमवितुं कलिताकृतयो
विचरन्ति महामहसश्छलतः ।
अहिमांशुरिवात्र विभासि गुरो
भव शंकर देशिक मे शरणम् ॥ ६॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
jagatīmavituṃ kalitākṛtayo
vicaranti mahāmahasaśchalataḥ .
ahimāṃśurivātra vibhāsi guro
bhava śaṃkara deśika me śaraṇam .. 6..
contentBlocks.translation: O teacher! For saving the world the great assume various forms and wander in disguise. Of them, thou shinest like the sun. Be thou my refuge, O master, Sañkara.
contentBlocks.meanings: जगतीम् (jagatīm) – the world; अवितुं (avitum) – to protect; कलिताकृतयः (kalitākṛtayaḥ) – assuming forms (kalita:assumed | ākṛtayaḥ:forms); विचरन्ति (vicaranti) – wander; महामहसः (mahāmahasaḥ) – of great brilliance (mahā:great | mahasaḥ:brilliance); छलतः (chalataḥ) – in disguise; अहिमांशुः (ahimāṃśuḥ) – the moon; इव (iva) – like; अत्र (atra) – here; विभासि (vibhāsi) – shine; गुरो (guro) – O teacher; भव (bhava) – be; शंकर (śaṃkara) – Sañkara; देशिक (deśika) – master; मे (me) – my; शरणम् (śaraṇam) – refuge;

contentBlocks.original:
गुरुपुंगव पुंगवकेतन ते
समतामयतां नहि कोऽपि सुधीः ।
शरणागतवत्सल तत्त्वनिधे
भव शंकर देशिक मे शरणम् ॥ ७॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
gurupuṃgava puṃgavaketana te
samatāmayatāṃ nahi ko'pi sudhīḥ .
śaraṇāgatavatsala tattvanidhe
bhava śaṃkara deśika me śaraṇam .. 7..
contentBlocks.translation: O the best of teachers! The Supreme lord having the bull as banner! None of the wise is equal to thee! Thou who art compassionate to those who have taken refuge! The treasure-trove of truth! Be thou my refuge, O master Sankara.
contentBlocks.meanings: गुरुपुंगव (gurupuṅgava) – O best of teachers (guru:teacher | puṅgava:best); पुंगवकेतन (puṅgavaketana) – having the bull as banner (puṅgava:bull | ketana:banner); ते (te) – to thee; समतामयतां (samatāmayatāṃ) – equality may attain (samatā:equality | mayatāṃ:may attain); नहि (nahi) – not; कः (kaḥ) – who; अपि (api) – even; सुधीः (sudhīḥ) – wise; शरणागतवत्सल (śaraṇāgatavatsala) – compassionate to those who seek refuge (śaraṇāgata:those who seek refuge | vatsala:compassionate); तत्त्वनिधे (tattvanidhe) – treasure-trove of truth (tattva:truth | nidhe:treasure-trove); भव (bhava) – be; शंकर (śaṃkara) – Sankara; देशिक (deśika) – master; मे (me) – my; शरणम् (śaraṇam) – refuge;

contentBlocks.original:
विदिता न मया विशदैककला
न च किंचन काञ्चनमस्ति गुरो ।
द्रुतमेव विधेहि कृपां सहजां
भव शंकर देशिक मे शरणम् ॥ ८॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
viditā na mayā viśadaikakalā
na ca kiṃcana kāñcanamasti guro .
drutameva vidhehi kṛpāṃ sahajāṃ
bhava śaṃkara deśika me śaraṇam .. 8..
contentBlocks.translation: Not even a single branch of knowledge has been understood by me correctly. Not even the least wealth do I possess, O teacher. Bestow on me quickly thy natural grace. Be thou my refuge, O master Sañkara.
contentBlocks.meanings: विदिता (viditā) – understood; न (na) – not; मया (mayā) – by me; विशदैककला (viśadaikakalā) – single branch of knowledge (viśada:clear | eka:one | kalā:branch of knowledge); न (na) – not; च (ca) – and; किञ्चन (kiṃcana) – even the least; काञ्चनम् (kāñcanam) – wealth; अस्ति (asti) – is; गुरो (guro) – O teacher; द्रुतम् (drutam) – quickly; एव (eva) – indeed; विधेहि (vidhehi) – bestow; कृपाम् (kṛpām) – grace; सहजाम् (sahajām) – natural; भव (bhava) – be; शंकर (śaṃkara) – Sañkara; देशिक (deśika) – master; मे (me) – my; शरणम् (śaraṇam) – refuge;
